_comment: Master registry of every pipeline step. 'compulsory': true means the step cannot be skipped.

1.1.title: Initialisation
1.1.description:
Set up directories and define processing parameters.
Locates raw event files and prepares output folder structure (Lightcurves/, Merged/). Runs evtool to create clean event files and writes file lists for downstream steps.

output.label: Input tiles on eRASS DR1 skymap

args.name: input_dir
args.label: Input Directory
args.help: Directory containing raw eROSITA event files (Raw_data/)

args.name: output_dir
args.label: Output Directory
args.help: Directory where processed/filtered data will be written

args.name: tile_map
args.label: Generate Tile Footprint Map
args.help: Generate input tiles footprint image on eRASS DR1 skymap (tile_map.png)

1.2.title: Flare Filtering
1.2.description:
Reads file lists written by Step 1.1. & Extracts lightcurves with flaregti, fits a Gaussian to the count-rate distribution, applies 3σ sigma-clipping, and re-runs evtool with the derived GTI threshold.
-Optionally produces diagnostic plots and/or a proof-check pass.

args.name: output_dir
args.label: Output Directory
args.help: Same output directory used in Step 1.1

args.name: timebin
args.label: Time Bin Size (s)
args.help: Bin size in seconds used for lightcurve extraction (default: 20)

args.name: ff_plots
args.label: Create Flare Filtering Plots
args.help: Save diagnostic plots for each tile's lightcurve and Gaussian fit

args.name: ff_proof
args.label: Proof-Check Flare Filtering
args.help: Run an additional proof-check pass after filtering

1.3.title: Merging
1.3.description:
Combines tile event lists into a single merged file and runs radec2xy. Uses flare-filtered lists from Step 1.2 when available; falls back to clean event lists from Step 1.1 if Step 1.2 was skipped.
-Optionally splits the merged list by Telescope Module (TM 1–9).

args.name: output_dir
args.label: Output Directory
args.help: Same output directory used in Step 1.1

args.name: center_ra
args.label: Center RA (deg)
args.help: Right ascension of the image center in degrees

args.name: center_dec
args.label: Center Dec (deg)
args.help: Declination of the image center in degrees

args.name: separate_tm
args.label: Separate by Telescope Module
args.help: Split merged event list into per-TM files (TM 1–9)
